name: aquameet
description: AquaMeet — diving competition management + e-judging + event infoboard (DiveRecorder/Sportity rebuild) on Cloudflare.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/venue-hub/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/judge/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/admin/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:frontends: pnpm build:web && pnpm build:judge && pnpm build:admin
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute aquameet --remote --file=apps/api/migrations/0001_init.sql -c apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:accounts: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute aquameet --remote --file=apps/api/migrations/0002_accounts.sql -c apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:sessions: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute aquameet --remote --file=apps/api/migrations/0003_sessions.sql -c apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:startlists: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute aquameet --remote --file=apps/api/migrations/0004_start_lists.sql -c apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy: pnpm build:all && pnpm exec wrangler deploy -c apps/api/wrangler.toml
